description: Placeholder for Income & Market Fit aggregates. Wire scripts to FFIEC AMI + tract files + HMDA LAR, then populate IncomeAggregateSnapshot per org.
steps: Ingest HMDA LAR (income, geography, action_taken, denials).
Join FFIEC estimated median family income for MSA/non-MSA.
Aggregate to lender × year × geo × income_band cubes.
POST snapshots via internal tool or seed Prisma IncomeAggregateSnapshot.payloadJson.
